nodes.name: advanced-elicitation
nodes.summary: BMAD task definition for advanced requirements elicitation techniques, providing structured methods for deep stakeholder interviews and requirements discovery

nodes.name: apply-qa-fixes
nodes.summary: BMAD task for applying QA-identified fixes, guiding systematic resolution of quality issues found during story or epic review

nodes.name: brownfield-create-epic
nodes.summary: BMAD task for creating epics in brownfield (existing) projects, adapting the epic creation process to account for existing codebase constraints

nodes.name: brownfield-create-story
nodes.summary: BMAD task for creating user stories in brownfield projects with consideration for existing code patterns and dependencies

nodes.name: correct-course
nodes.summary: BMAD task for correcting project direction when work deviates from the original plan or requirements

nodes.name: create-brownfield-story
nodes.summary: Detailed BMAD task template for creating user stories in brownfield projects, including code analysis and impact assessment steps

nodes.name: create-deep-research-prompt
nodes.summary: BMAD task for creating structured deep research prompts for AI-assisted technical investigation and analysis

nodes.name: create-doc
nodes.summary: BMAD task for creating project documentation using established templates and standards

nodes.name: create-next-story
nodes.summary: BMAD task for creating the next user story in a sequence, pulling from the backlog and following proper story structure

nodes.name: document-project
nodes.summary: BMAD task for comprehensively documenting a project including architecture, APIs, and development workflows

nodes.name: execute-checklist
nodes.summary: BMAD task for systematically executing quality checklists during story or epic review processes

nodes.name: facilitate-brainstorming-session
nodes.summary: BMAD task for facilitating structured brainstorming sessions to explore design options or solve technical problems

nodes.name: generate-ai-frontend-prompt
nodes.summary: BMAD task for generating AI-optimized prompts for frontend development tasks

nodes.name: index-docs
nodes.summary: BMAD task for creating and maintaining documentation indexes that provide navigable overviews of project documentation

nodes.name: kb-mode-interaction
nodes.summary: BMAD task defining knowledge base interaction mode for querying and updating the project knowledge base

nodes.name: nfr-assess
nodes.summary: BMAD task for assessing non-functional requirements including performance, security, scalability, and reliability criteria

nodes.name: qa-gate
nodes.summary: BMAD task for running QA gate checks before story acceptance, ensuring all quality criteria are met

nodes.name: review-story
nodes.summary: BMAD task for reviewing user stories for completeness, testability, and alignment with acceptance criteria

nodes.name: risk-profile
nodes.summary: BMAD task for assessing and documenting technical and business risks for epics and stories

nodes.name: shard-doc
nodes.summary: BMAD task for breaking large documentation into smaller, more manageable shards for better navigation
